agent.name: Carrier Trailer Prioritization
agent.description: Automates weekly inbound trailer prioritization for Carrier Corporation's Chattanooga aftermarket warehouse. Scores ~190 trailers by OTIF (on-time-in-full) and revenue impact, auto-assigns dock slots, and notifies the Kenco inbound scheduler.
agent.author: Bill Whalen - Microsoft
agent.platform: Power Platform (Canvas App + Dataverse + Power Automate)

metadata.name: CarrierTrailerPrioritization
metadata.description: Scores and schedules inbound trailers at Carrier's Chattanooga warehouse by OTIF and revenue impact.

action.description: The trailer prioritization action to perform

actions.name: get_prioritized_schedule
actions.description: Get the full ranked list of trailers for the current week

example.output:
**Week of Mar 23 — Prioritized Trailer Schedule**

🏆 **TOP 5 by Composite Score:**

| Rank | Trailer | Supplier | OTIF Parts | Revenue | Dock |
|------|---------|----------|------------|---------|------|
| #1 | TMS-4821 | CMXB Factory | 47 parts | $128K | Dock 2 |
| #2 | TMS-3390 | Charlotte Factory | 41 parts | $97K | Dock 2 |
| #3 | TMS-5512 | External Supplier A | 38 parts | $84K | Dock 1 |
| #4 | TMS-2201 | CDEG Factory | 29 parts | $71K | Dock 2 |
| #5 | TMS-6670 | Indianapolis Factory | 22 parts | $58K | Dock 1 |

📊 **Summary:** 190 trailers scored | 23 confirmed this week | 12 overflow | 155 pending
💰 **Total potential revenue clearance: $2.4M**

actions.name: score_trailer
actions.description: Score a specific trailer by OTIF and revenue impact

example.output:
**Trailer TMS-4821 Scoring Analysis**

🚛 **Source:** CMXB Factory (SAP) | Ship date: Mar 20

📦 **Manifest:** 147 line items | 23 unique part numbers

**Prioritization Scores:**
- ✅ OTIF Score: **47 parts** on backorder (weight 50%) → 94 points
- 💰 Revenue Impact: **$128,400** clears if received (weight 40%) → 82 points  
- ⏱️ Detention Cost: $0 (no accrual yet)

**Composite Score: 88.2 / 100**
**Priority Rank: #1 of 190**

📍 **Recommended:** Dock 2 | Mon Mar 24 | Slot 08:00–10:00

actions.name: assign_dock
actions.description: Assign a trailer to a specific dock and time slot

example.output:
✅ **Dock Assignment Confirmed**

Trailer **TMS-4821** → **Dock 2**
Date: Monday, March 24
Time slot: 08:00–10:00
Status: Scheduled → pending Kenco confirmation

📧 Notification queued for Kenco IB Scheduler.

actions.name: get_dock_status
actions.description: Get current capacity utilization across all docks

example.output:
**Chattanooga Dock Capacity — Week of Mar 23**

| Dock | Capacity | Scheduled | Available | Utilization |
|------|----------|-----------|-----------|-------------|
| Dock 1 | 5/day (25/wk) | 18 | 7 | 72% |
| Dock 2 | 15/day (75/wk) | 52 | 23 | 69% |
| Overflow | 3/day (15/wk) | 12 | 3 | 80% |

⚠️ **Overflow at 80%** — Only approved low-backlog suppliers eligible.
✅ **Dock 1 & 2:** Capacity available for high-priority trailers.

actions.name: get_unscheduled_trailers
actions.description: List trailers still awaiting dock assignment

example.output:
**Unscheduled Trailers — Action Required**

⚡ **167 trailers unscheduled** (190 total - 23 confirmed)

**Top 5 awaiting assignment:**
1. TMS-4821 | CMXB | Score: 88.2 | $128K revenue | **Assign to Dock 2 →**
2. TMS-3390 | Charlotte | Score: 81.5 | $97K | **Assign to Dock 2 →**
3. TMS-5512 | Ext. Supplier A | Score: 74.1 | $84K | **Assign to Dock 1 →**

💡 **Tip:** Click 'Auto-Schedule' to assign all trailers by priority rank automatically.

actions.name: send_schedule_to_kenco
actions.description: Send confirmed weekly schedule to Kenco inbound scheduler

example.output:
📧 **Schedule Sent to Kenco IB Scheduler**

✅ Email delivered to: kenco-ib-scheduler@carrier.com
CC: Sonali Horan (Materials Manager)

**Schedule Summary:**
- 23 trailers confirmed
- Week of March 23–27
- Dock 1: 18 trailers | Dock 2: 52 trailers | Overflow: 12 trailers
- Total potential revenue: $2.4M

⏱️ TSPs will receive appointment confirmations within 2 hours.

actions.name: log_reschedule
actions.description: Log a TSP reschedule request and update trailer status

input.reason: Driver mechanical issue, earliest available Tuesday March 25

example.output:
⚠️ **Reschedule Logged — TMS-3390**

Previous slot: Mon Mar 24, Dock 2, 10:00–12:00
TSP reason: *Driver mechanical issue, earliest available Tue Mar 25*
New status: Rescheduled

📋 **Next step:** Trailer moved back to unscheduled queue at Priority Rank #2.
📧 Sonali Horan notified.

Would you like to reassign this slot to Trailer TMS-5512 (next in queue, Score: 74.1)?

demoConversation.content: Show me this week's trailer schedule.

**Week of Mar 23 — Prioritized Trailer Schedule**

🏆 **TOP 5 by Composite Score:**

| Rank | Trailer | Supplier | OTIF Parts | Revenue | Dock |
|------|---------|----------|------------|---------|------|
| #1 | TMS-4821 | CMXB Factory | 47 parts | $128K | Dock 2 |
| #2 | TMS-3390 | Charlotte Factory | 41 parts | $97K | Dock 2 |
| #3 | TMS-5512 | External Supplier A | 38 parts | $84K | Dock 1 |
| #4 | TMS-2201 | CDEG Factory | 29 parts | $71K | Dock 2 |
| #5 | TMS-6670 | Indianapolis Factory | 22 parts | $58K | Dock 1 |

📊 **190 trailers scored** | 23 confirmed | 12 overflow | 155 pending
💰 **Total potential revenue clearance: $2.4M**

Would you like to score a specific trailer, assign docks, or send the schedule to Kenco?

**Trailer TMS-4821 Scoring Analysis**

🚛 **Source:** CMXB Factory (SAP) | Ship date: Mar 20

📦 **Manifest:** 147 line items | 23 unique part numbers

**Prioritization Scores:**
- ✅ OTIF Score: **47 parts** on backorder (weight 50%) → 94 points
- 💰 Revenue Impact: **$128,400** clears if received (weight 40%) → 82 points
- ⏱️ Detention Cost: $0 (no accrual yet)

**Composite Score: 88.2 / 100** — Highest of 190 trailers this week

📍 **Recommended:** Dock 2 | Mon Mar 24 | Slot 08:00–10:00

Receiving this trailer first means **47 customer backorders ship today** and **$128K in revenue clears immediately** instead of sitting in limbo.
Go ahead and assign it to Dock 2.

✅ **Dock Assignment Confirmed**

Trailer **TMS-4821** → **Dock 2**
Date: Monday, March 24
Time slot: 08:00–10:00
Status: Scheduled → pending Kenco confirmation

📧 Notification queued for Kenco IB Scheduler.

Dock 2 now has 53/75 slots filled this week (71% utilization). Ready to auto-schedule the remaining 167 trailers?

⚡ **Auto-Schedule Complete!**

✅ **190 trailers assigned in priority order:**
- Dock 1 (5/day): 25 trailers — highest OTIF, no overflow eligibility
- Dock 2 (15/day): 75 trailers — core scheduling capacity
- Overflow (3/day): 15 trailers — approved suppliers, low/zero backlog
- 📅 Spill-over: 75 trailers scheduled for weeks 2 & 3

💰 **Revenue confirmed for this week: $2.4M**

Ready to send the confirmed schedule to Kenco?

📧 **Schedule Sent to Kenco IB Scheduler**

✅ Email delivered to: kenco-ib-scheduler@carrier.com
CC: Sonali Horan (Materials Manager), Kevin Gollmer

**Schedule Summary:**
- 115 trailers confirmed for this week
- Dock 1: 25 | Dock 2: 75 | Overflow: 15
- Total potential revenue: **$2.4M**

⏱️ TSPs will receive appointment confirmations within 2 hours.

**Time saved vs. manual process: ~6 hours** _(previously done by hand every Monday in spreadsheets)_
